use_cases: Display categorical labels or status indicators on UI elements
Show counts or metadata associated with content items
Highlight featured or selected items in lists and grids
Provide visual feedback for user-applied filters or tags
ai_summary: A reusable badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with class-variance-authority. Part of a shadcn/ui-style component library, featuring standard hover states and ring focus accessibility. Provides flexible labeling and categorization capability for any UI context.
